entry.title: Ahmed intros Baby Rogers + QB Countdown recap | Chris Simms Unbuttoned (FULL Ep. 884) | NFL on NBC
entry.summary:
“My boyfriend’s back and he’s better than ever…” Chris and Ahmed reunite to recap the Simms QB Countdown and answer some #AskMeAnything questions. Who would Chris rather have right now, Drake London or Nico Collins? But first, we welcome the newest member of the Unbuttoned family…Cameron Rogers! #NFLonNBC #NFL #ChrisSimmsUnbuttoned
Chapters: (0:00) We proudly present…Cameron Rogers!!! Who already has his dad’s style. (6:20) News: Nick Herbig gets big contract (11:10) Micah Parsons will miss the start of the season (17:25) Drake London gets 4-year extension (23:25) Rome Odunze’s eye-opening comments on his foot (25:10) Russell Wilson retires (32:25) QB Countdown: Which Draft Class quartet would Chris take for the future? (37:50) Homies react to Chris’ Top 10 (38:55) QB #7 Justin Herbert…is he given too many excuses? (42:05) QB #6 Caleb Williams…could he be #1 next year? (47:40) QB #5 Matthew Stafford…should he have been Top 4? (50:20) QB #4 Patrick Mahomes…do his accomplishments make him overrated or underrated? (53:10) QB #3 Lamar Jackson & #2 Joe Burrow…what separates them? (55:15) QB #1 Josh Allen…is he truly “unstoppable?” (1:03:35) #AskMeAnything: Myles Garrett MVP? Super Kicker? And when is Chris gonna drop another song?
NBC Sports Group serves sports fans 24/7 with premier live events, insightful studio shows, and compelling original programming. NBC Sports is an established leader in the sports media landscape with an unparalleled collection of sports properties that include the Olympics, NFL, NBA, Premier League, Big Ten, NASCAR, PGA TOUR, the Kentucky Derby, Tour de France and many more. Subscribe to our channel for the latest sporting news and highlights!
'Chris Simms Unbuttoned' features in-depth Xs and Os NFL analysis; one-on-one interviews with players, coaches, executives, and draft prospects; game recaps and previews; gambling segments; extensive player analysis leading into the NFL draft; and much more.
Watch more from NBC Sports on YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/nbcsports Visit NBC Sports: https://www.nbcsports.com Find NBC Sports on Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/NBCSports Follow NBC Sports on Twitter: https://twitter.com/nbcsports Follow NBC Sports on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/nbcsports/
https://www.nbcsports.com/nfl/sunday-night-football https://nbcsports.com/motors/nascar https://nbcsports.com/soccer/premier-league
Ahmed intros Baby Rogers + QB Countdown recap | Chris Simms Unbuttoned (FULL Ep. 884) | NFL on NBC https://www.youtube.com/NFLonNBC
entry.content:
“My boyfriend’s back and he’s better than ever…” Chris and Ahmed reunite to recap the Simms QB Countdown and answer some #AskMeAnything questions. Who would Chris rather have right now, Drake London or Nico Collins? But first, we welcome the newest member of the Unbuttoned family…Cameron Rogers! #NFLonNBC #NFL #ChrisSimmsUnbuttoned

Chapters:
(0:00) We proudly present…Cameron Rogers!!! Who already has his dad’s style.
(6:20) News: Nick Herbig gets big contract
(11:10) Micah Parsons will miss the start of the season
(17:25) Drake London gets 4-year extension
(23:25) Rome Odunze’s eye-opening comments on his foot
(25:10) Russell Wilson retires
(32:25) QB Countdown: Which Draft Class quartet would Chris take for the future?
(37:50) Homies react to Chris’ Top 10
(38:55) QB #7 Justin Herbert…is he given too many excuses?
(42:05) QB #6 Caleb Williams…could he be #1 next year?
(47:40) QB #5 Matthew Stafford…should he have been Top 4?
(50:20) QB #4 Patrick Mahomes…do his accomplishments make him overrated or underrated?
(53:10) QB #3 Lamar Jackson & #2 Joe Burrow…what separates them?
(55:15) QB #1 Josh Allen…is he truly “unstoppable?”
(1:03:35) #AskMeAnything: Myles Garrett MVP? Super Kicker? And when is Chris gonna drop another song?

NBC Sports Group serves sports fans 24/7 with premier live events, insightful studio shows, and compelling original programming. NBC Sports is an established leader in the sports media landscape with an unparalleled collection of sports properties that include the Olympics, NFL, NBA, Premier League, Big Ten, NASCAR, PGA TOUR, the Kentucky Derby, Tour de France and many more. Subscribe to our channel for the latest sporting news and highlights!

'Chris Simms Unbuttoned' features in-depth Xs and Os NFL analysis; one-on-one interviews with players, coaches, executives, and draft prospects; game recaps and previews; gambling segments; extensive player analysis leading into the NFL draft; and much more.

Watch more from NBC Sports on YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/nbcsports

https://www.youtube.com/NFLonNBC

entry.title: Myles Garrett to LA + Simms QB Countdown: Top 4 | Chris Simms Unbuttoned (FULL Ep. 883) | NFL on NBC
entry.summary:
The Simms 2026 QB Countdown concludes with THE FINAL FOUR! Where does Chris rank Patrick, Josh, Joe, and Lamar? But first, Simms & Stugotz dive into the blockbuster Myles Garrett & A.J. Brown trades…is an Aaron Donald return next? #NFLonNBC #NFL #ChrisSimmsUnbuttoned
Chapters: (0:00) Chris recaps his visit with “old soul” Caleb Williams (7:10) News: Myles Garrett blockbuster trade to Rams (20:10) Could Aaron Donald return? (26:05) A.J. Brown finally lands with Patriots (37:35) Simms QB Countdown: It’s the Big Four once again (40:50) QB #4 Patrick Mahomes (45:45) QB #3 Lamar Jackson (49:25) QB #2 Joe Burrow (54:05) QB #1 Josh Allen (1:03:05) Caleb Williams is the new Madden cover
NBC Sports Group serves sports fans 24/7 with premier live events, insightful studio shows, and compelling original programming. NBC Sports is an established leader in the sports media landscape with an unparalleled collection of sports properties that include the Olympics, NFL, NBA, Premier League, Big Ten, NASCAR, PGA TOUR, the Kentucky Derby, Tour de France and many more. Subscribe to our channel for the latest sporting news and highlights!
'Chris Simms Unbuttoned' features in-depth Xs and Os NFL analysis; one-on-one interviews with players, coaches, executives, and draft prospects; game recaps and previews; gambling segments; extensive player analysis leading into the NFL draft; and much more. #NFLonNBC #NFL #NFLDraft

Myles Garrett to LA + Simms QB Countdown: Top 4 | Chris Simms Unbuttoned (FULL Ep. 883) | NFL on NBC https://www.youtube.com/NFLonNBC
entry.content:
The Simms 2026 QB Countdown concludes with THE FINAL FOUR! Where does Chris rank Patrick, Josh, Joe, and Lamar? But first, Simms & Stugotz dive into the blockbuster Myles Garrett & A.J. Brown trades…is an Aaron Donald return next? #NFLonNBC #NFL #ChrisSimmsUnbuttoned

Chapters:
(0:00) Chris recaps his visit with “old soul” Caleb Williams
(7:10) News: Myles Garrett blockbuster trade to Rams
(20:10) Could Aaron Donald return?
(26:05) A.J. Brown finally lands with Patriots
(37:35) Simms QB Countdown: It’s the Big Four once again
(40:50) QB #4 Patrick Mahomes
(45:45) QB #3 Lamar Jackson
(49:25) QB #2 Joe Burrow
(54:05) QB #1 Josh Allen
(1:03:05) Caleb Williams is the new Madden cover

entry.title: Simms QB Countdown #10-8 + A.J. Brown trade? | Chris Simms Unbuttoned (FULL Ep. 881) | NFL on NBC
entry.summary:
Connor is out, so Simms calls in his (self-proclaimed?) podcast mentor Stugotz to steer the ship. The guys recount how the QB Countdown started 8 years ago, and then reveal 3 more QBs in this year’s Countdown. Plus, the A.J. Brown trade clock officially starts ticking, and will the 2024 QB class go down as the best ever? #NFLonNBC #NFL #ChrisSimmsUnbuttoned
Chapters: (0:00) We get a full history of the birth of the Simms QB Countdown (7:00) Which Simms QB Countdown rank has gotten the most blowback? (17:40) News: A.J. Brown trade watch (20:10) Simms QB Countdown: Homies react to the ranking of Sam Darnold, Jared Goff, Trevor Lawrence, & Dak Prescott (29:50) QB #10 Baker Mayfield (38:25) Simms has THREE QBs from the 2024 Draft in his Top 9…could it be the greatest QB class ever? (45:30) QB #9 Jayden Daniels (57:35) QB #8 Drake Maye NBC Sports Group serves sports fans 24/7 with premier live events, insightful studio shows, and compelling original programming. NBC Sports is an established leader in the sports media landscape with an unparalleled collection of sports properties that include the Olympics, NFL, NBA, Premier League, Big Ten, NASCAR, PGA TOUR, the Kentucky Derby, Tour de France and many more. Subscribe to our channel for the latest sporting news and highlights!
'Chris Simms Unbuttoned' features in-depth Xs and Os NFL analysis; one-on-one interviews with players, coaches, executives, and draft prospects; game recaps and previews; gambling segments; extensive player analysis leading into the NFL draft; and much more. #NFLonNBC #NFL #NFLDraft
Watch more from NBC Sports on YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/nbcsports Visit NBC Sports: https://www.nbcsports.com Find NBC Sports on Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/NBCSports Follow NBC Sports on Twitter: https://twitter.com/nbcsports Follow NBC Sports on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/nbcsports/

Simms QB Countdown #10-8 + A.J. Brown trade? | Chris Simms Unbuttoned (FULL Ep. 881) | NFL on NBC https://www.youtube.com/NFLonNBC
entry.content:
Connor is out, so Simms calls in his (self-proclaimed?) podcast mentor Stugotz to steer the ship. The guys recount how the QB Countdown started 8 years ago, and then reveal 3 more QBs in this year’s Countdown. Plus, the A.J. Brown trade clock officially starts ticking, and will the 2024 QB class go down as the best ever? #NFLonNBC #NFL #ChrisSimmsUnbuttoned

Chapters:
(0:00) We get a full history of the birth of the Simms QB Countdown
(7:00) Which Simms QB Countdown rank has gotten the most blowback?
(17:40) News: A.J. Brown trade watch
(20:10) Simms QB Countdown: Homies react to the ranking of Sam Darnold, Jared Goff, Trevor Lawrence, & Dak Prescott
(29:50) QB #10 Baker Mayfield
(38:25) Simms has THREE QBs from the 2024 Draft in his Top 9…could it be the greatest QB class ever?
(45:30) QB #9 Jayden Daniels
(57:35) QB #8 Drake Maye

entry.title: Simms QB Countdown #14-11; J.J. McCarthy is mad | Chris Simms Unbuttoned (FULL Ep. 880) | NFL on NBC
entry.summary:
It’s Connor’s LAST episode before he enters fatherhood, and he’s going out in style. Or “in vogue?” Simms reveals 4 more names in his QB Countdown…who lands JUST outside his Top 10? Plus, J.J. McCarthy does not seem happy to be in a QB competition, and Chris tells a Madonna story. #NFLonNBC #NFL #ChrisSimmsUnbuttoned
Chapters: (0:00) Papa Connor is “going out with a bang!” (5:15) Homies comments: One of them launches a Chris story about meeting Madonna when he was WAY too young (14:20) News: A.J. Brown isn’t at OTAs, and Jalen Hurts had an interesting quote about it (17:45) J.J. McCarthy weighs in on the Vikings QB competition (25:25) Daniel Jones is practicing (27:50) Simms QB Countdown: Homies react to Brock Purdy, Bo Nix, & Jordan Love (38:10) QB #14 Sam Darnold (46:20) DraftKings NFC West odds (53:50) QB #13 Jared Goff (59:30) QB #12 Trevor Lawrence (1:04:20) QB #11 Dak Prescott
NBC Sports Group serves sports fans 24/7 with premier live events, insightful studio shows, and compelling original programming. NBC Sports is an established leader in the sports media landscape with an unparalleled collection of sports properties that include the Olympics, NFL, NBA, Premier League, Big Ten, NASCAR, PGA TOUR, the Kentucky Derby, Tour de France and many more. Subscribe to our channel for the latest sporting news and highlights!
'Chris Simms Unbuttoned' features in-depth Xs and Os NFL analysis; one-on-one interviews with players, coaches, executives, and draft prospects; game recaps and previews; gambling segments; extensive player analysis leading into the NFL draft; and much more. #NFLonNBC #NFL #NFLDraft

entry.title: Simms QB Countdown #18-15 + Nico or CeeDee? | Chris Simms Unbuttoned (FULL Ep. 879) | NFL on NBC
entry.summary:
The QB Countdown continues with 4 more names on Chris’ list, including 2 passers recovering from an injury. Plus, the guys react to Nico Collins’ new deal and discuss how he compares to the highest-paid receivers in the NFL. But first, the homies discovered a new Simmsism.. #NFLonNBC #NFL #ChrisSimmsUnbuttoned
Chapters: (0:00) Chris says what’s up to Connor…and isn’t faking it (2:55) The homies weigh in on our Jaxson Dart conversation (8:05) News: Bears QB Coach has some strong words for Caleb Williams (11:05) Nico Collins gets revised contract from Texans (17:40) Derwin James gets extension from Chargers (22:20) Lamar Jackson back at OTAs (23:25) Patrick Mahomes throwing at OTAs after ACL repair (24:45) DraftKings: Comeback Player of the Year odds (27:50) Simms QB Countdown: Homies react to Malik Willis, Jalen Hurts, Tyler Shough, & short QBs (38:40) QB #18 Daniel Jones (46:15) QB #17 Brock Purdy (56:45) QB #16 Bo Nix (1:03:30) QB #15 Jordan Love
NBC Sports Group serves sports fans 24/7 with premier live events, insightful studio shows, and compelling original programming. NBC Sports is an established leader in the sports media landscape with an unparalleled collection of sports properties that include the Olympics, NFL, NBA, Premier League, Big Ten, NASCAR, PGA TOUR, the Kentucky Derby, Tour de France and many more. Subscribe to our channel for the latest sporting news and highlights!
'Chris Simms Unbuttoned' features in-depth Xs and Os NFL analysis; one-on-one interviews with players, coaches, executives, and draft prospects; game recaps and previews; gambling segments; extensive player analysis leading into the NFL draft; and much more. #NFLonNBC #NFL #NFLDraft

entry.content:
The QB Countdown continues with 4 more names on Chris’ list, including 2 passers recovering from an injury. Plus, the guys react to Nico Collins’ new deal and discuss how he compares to the highest-paid receivers in the NFL. But first, the homies discovered a new Simmsism.. #NFLonNBC #NFL #ChrisSimmsUnbuttoned

Chapters:
(0:00) Chris says what’s up to Connor…and isn’t faking it
(2:55) The homies weigh in on our Jaxson Dart conversation
(8:05) News: Bears QB Coach has some strong words for Caleb Williams
(11:05) Nico Collins gets revised contract from Texans
(17:40) Derwin James gets extension from Chargers
(22:20) Lamar Jackson back at OTAs
(23:25) Patrick Mahomes throwing at OTAs after ACL repair
(24:45) DraftKings: Comeback Player of the Year odds
(27:50) Simms QB Countdown: Homies react to Malik Willis, Jalen Hurts, Tyler Shough, & short QBs
(38:40) QB #18 Daniel Jones
(46:15) QB #17 Brock Purdy
(56:45) QB #16 Bo Nix
(1:03:30) QB #15 Jordan Love

entry.title: Simms QB Countdown #24-19: Make or Break | Chris Simms Unbuttoned (FULL Ep. 878) | NFL on NBC
entry.summary:
The QB Countdown enters the Top 20, with some passers facing a make-or-break season. Jaxson Dart’s “missteps” made some unwanted headlines for the Giants this weekend. But first, Connor pays $50 to be Chris’ friend again. #NFLonNBC #NFL #ChrisSimmsUnbuttoned
Chapters: (0:00) Connor makes up for his terrible friend mistake (6:45) Knicks: Where were Chris & Connor in 1999? (11:50) Homie comments: Top 40 birds, Old school arms, and John Elway vs Aaron Rodgers (20:40) News: Jaxson Dart’s “misstep” and what it means for the Giants locker room (33:35) Giants extend GM Joe Schoen’s contract (35:40) Rams & Matthew Stafford agree to 1-year extension (42:00) Simms QB Countdown: Homies react to Tyler Shough, Aaron Rodgers, & Jameis Winston (46:45) QB #24 Geno Smith (49:55) QB #23 Cam Ward (53:10) QB #22 Jaxson Dart (58:20) QB #21 Jalen Hurts (1:02:30) DraftKings: NFC East odds (1:04:50) QB #20 C.J. Stroud (1:11:05) QB #19 Malik Willis NBC Sports Group serves sports fans 24/7 with premier live events, insightful studio shows, and compelling original programming. NBC Sports is an established leader in the sports media landscape with an unparalleled collection of sports properties that include the Olympics, NFL, NBA, Premier League, Big Ten, NASCAR, PGA TOUR, the Kentucky Derby, Tour de France and many more. Subscribe to our channel for the latest sporting news and highlights!
'Chris Simms Unbuttoned' features in-depth Xs and Os NFL analysis; one-on-one interviews with players, coaches, executives, and draft prospects; game recaps and previews; gambling segments; extensive player analysis leading into the NFL draft; and much more. #NFLonNBC #NFL #NFLDraft
Watch more from NBC Sports on YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/nbcsports Visit NBC Sports: https://www.nbcsports.com Find NBC Sports on Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/NBCSports Follow NBC Sports on Twitter: https://twitter.com/nbcsports Follow NBC Sports on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/nbcsports/

Simms QB Countdown #24-19: Make or Break | Chris Simms Unbuttoned (FULL Ep. 878) | NFL on NBC https://www.youtube.com/NFLonNBC
entry.content:
The QB Countdown enters the Top 20, with some passers facing a make-or-break season. Jaxson Dart’s “missteps” made some unwanted headlines for the Giants this weekend. But first, Connor pays $50 to be Chris’ friend again. #NFLonNBC #NFL #ChrisSimmsUnbuttoned

Chapters:
(0:00) Connor makes up for his terrible friend mistake
(6:45) Knicks: Where were Chris & Connor in 1999?
(11:50) Homie comments: Top 40 birds, Old school arms, and John Elway vs Aaron Rodgers
(20:40) News: Jaxson Dart’s “misstep” and what it means for the Giants locker room
(33:35) Giants extend GM Joe Schoen’s contract
(35:40) Rams & Matthew Stafford agree to 1-year extension
(42:00) Simms QB Countdown: Homies react to Tyler Shough, Aaron Rodgers, & Jameis Winston
(46:45) QB #24 Geno Smith
(49:55) QB #23 Cam Ward
(53:10) QB #22 Jaxson Dart
(58:20) QB #21 Jalen Hurts
(1:02:30) DraftKings: NFC East odds
(1:04:50) QB #20 C.J. Stroud
(1:11:05) QB #19 Malik Willis

entry.title: Simms QB Countdown #28-25 + Josh Allen Trivia | Chris Simms Unbuttoned (FULL Ep. 877) | NFL on NBC
entry.summary:
In a JAM-PACKED episode of Unbuttoned, Chris reveals another 4 QBs in the Countdown, including his highest-ranked backup. Plus, who did he forget to put on my Mount Rushmore of All-Time Arms? Chirs & Connor also react to news about Aaron Rodgers & the Browns QBs, and then try to answer some Josh Allen trivia. #NFLonNBC #NFL #ChrisSimmsUnbuttoned
Chapters: (0:00) Who are the angriest fan bases Chris has encountered? (9:15) Mount Rushmore of All-Time Arms: Why didn’t Dan Marino make the cut? (22:15) Aaron Rodgers will retire after this season (27:35) Todd Monken wants to name his starting QB soon (32:30) CeeDee Lamb wants the grass to stay after the World Cup (35:55) Nolan Smith arrested for reckless driving (41:35) QB Countdown: Homies have questions about Tanner McKee, Bryce Young, and Kyler Murray (47:55) QB #28 Joe Flacco (53:10) QB #27 Tyler Shough (56:25) QB #26 Aaron Rodgers (59:10) QB #25 Jacoby Brissett (1:02:55) DraftKings: AFC North odds (1:07:50) Thursday Trivia: Inspired by Josh Allen’s 30th birthday
(1:14:25) Best 30-year-old players for this season NBC Sports Group serves sports fans 24/7 with premier live events, insightful studio shows, and compelling original programming. NBC Sports is an established leader in the sports media landscape with an unparalleled collection of sports properties that include the Olympics, NFL, NBA, Premier League, Big Ten, NASCAR, PGA TOUR, the Kentucky Derby, Tour de France and many more. Subscribe to our channel for the latest sporting news and highlights!
'Chris Simms Unbuttoned' features in-depth Xs and Os NFL analysis; one-on-one interviews with players, coaches, executives, and draft prospects; game recaps and previews; gambling segments; extensive player analysis leading into the NFL draft; and much more. #NFLonNBC #NFL #NFLDraft

Simms QB Countdown #28-25 + Josh Allen Trivia | Chris Simms Unbuttoned (FULL Ep. 877) | NFL on NBC https://www.youtube.com/NFLonNBC
entry.content:
In a JAM-PACKED episode of Unbuttoned, Chris reveals another 4 QBs in the Countdown, including his highest-ranked backup. Plus, who did he forget to put on my Mount Rushmore of All-Time Arms? Chirs & Connor also react to news about Aaron Rodgers & the Browns QBs, and then try to answer some Josh Allen trivia. #NFLonNBC #NFL #ChrisSimmsUnbuttoned

Chapters:
(0:00) Who are the angriest fan bases Chris has encountered?
(9:15) Mount Rushmore of All-Time Arms: Why didn’t Dan Marino make the cut?
(22:15) Aaron Rodgers will retire after this season
(27:35) Todd Monken wants to name his starting QB soon
(32:30) CeeDee Lamb wants the grass to stay after the World Cup
(35:55) Nolan Smith arrested for reckless driving
(41:35) QB Countdown: Homies have questions about Tanner McKee, Bryce Young, and Kyler Murray
(47:55) QB #28 Joe Flacco
(53:10) QB #27 Tyler Shough
(56:25) QB #26 Aaron Rodgers
(59:10) QB #25 Jacoby Brissett
(1:02:55) DraftKings: AFC North odds
(1:07:50) Thursday Trivia: Inspired by Josh Allen’s 30th birthday

(1:14:25) Best 30-year-old players for this season

NBC Sports is an established leader in the sports media landscape with an unparalleled collection of sports properties that include the Olympics, NFL, NBA, Premier League, Big Ten, NASCAR, PGA TOUR, the Kentucky Derby, Tour de France and many more. Subscribe to our channel for the latest sporting news and highlights!

'Chris Simms Unbuttoned' features in-depth Xs and Os NFL analysis; one-on-one interviews with players, coaches, executives, and draft prospects; game recaps and previews; gambling segments; extensive player analysis leading into the NFL draft; and much more. #NFLonNBC #NFL #NFLDraft
